factors.summary: Demand is negatively impacted due to COVID-19.

evidence.text: Customer demand impacting our new equipment, maintenance and repair, and modernization businesses.
evidence.subsection: Impact of COVID-19 on our Company

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: Demand is significantly impacted by COVID-19, indicating major risks.

evidence.text: Organic volume decrease of (1.2)% for the quarter ended September 30, 2020 and (3.3)% for the nine months ended September 30, 2020.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Revenue growth is decelerating, showing a moderate headwind.

evidence.text: Organic sales decreases of (1.0)% in the New Equipment segment and (1.4)% in the Service segment for the quarter ended September 30, 2020.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Unit volumes are declining, indicating a clear downward trend.

factors.summary: End markets are weakening due to COVID-19.

evidence.text: Customer demand impacting our new equipment, maintenance and repair, and modernization businesses.
evidence.subsection: Impact of COVID-19 on our Company

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: End markets are weakening due to COVID-19, causing significant issues.

factors.summary: Labor costs are manageable with cost containment actions.

evidence.text: Cost containment actions have included, but are not limited to, reducing payroll costs.
evidence.subsection: Impact of COVID-19 on our Company

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Labor costs are manageable with effective cost containment actions.

evidence.text: Gross margin increased 60 basis points for both the quarter and nine months ended September 30, 2020.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Gross margins are stable and improving, indicating a positive trend.

factors.summary: Restructuring costs are being incurred but savings are expected.

evidence.text: Total Restructuring costs were $46 million for the nine months ended September 30, 2020.
evidence.subsection: Nine Months Ended September 30, (dollars in millions) 2020 2019 Restructuring costs $ 46   $ 44

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Restructuring costs are incurred but expected to yield savings, showing a positive development.

evidence.text: Temporary closure or reduced capacity of our factory operations and those of our suppliers.
evidence.subsection: Impact of COVID-19 on our Company

sentiment.label: very_negative
sentiment.rationale: Supply chain is disrupted due to factory closures and supplier issues, indicating significant problems.

factors.summary: Near-term risks include economic uncertainty and restructuring costs.

evidence.text: We currently do not expect any significant impact to our capital and financial resources, including our overall liquidity position. We are focused on navigating these challenges presented by COVID-19 by preserving our liquidity and managing our cash flow.
evidence.subsection: Impact of COVID-19 on our Company

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: The company is facing near-term risks such as economic uncertainty and restructuring costs, which are moderately concerning.

factors.summary: Economic conditions are challenging due to COVID-19.

evidence.text: The broader implications of COVID-19 on our results of operations, including net sales and overall financial performance remain uncertain, however we anticipate it will negatively impact our business for at least the remainder of 2020.
evidence.subsection: Impact of COVID-19 on our Company

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Economic conditions are challenging due to COVID-19, with a clear negative impact anticipated for at least the remainder of 2020.

evidence.text: Research and development spending decreased approximately $2 million for the quarter ended September 30, 2020 and decreased $6 million for the nine months ended September 30, 2020 compared to the same periods in 2019.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: R&D spending is decreasing, indicating a potential headwind for innovation and growth.

factors.summary: Headcount restructuring is occurring with cost reductions.

evidence.text: We are targeting to complete in 2020 and 2021 the majority of the remaining workforce cost reduction actions initiated in 2020.
evidence.subsection: Nine Months Ended September 30, (dollars in millions) 2020 2019 Restructuring costs $ 46   $ 44

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Headcount restructuring is occurring with cost reductions, but the sentiment is mixed without clear positive or negative signals.
